name: Vladimir Makarov
description:
He never would have done it had he known you were right there.
---
Y'all, I can *not* thank you enough for all of the love and support I have been getting recently. This has not only made my day, but my family's day. And that is priceless. Thank you so so much. This one was fun to write, actually! Thanks to the lovely person who commissioned me for it, thank you thank you thank you!
creator: Punktatixs
